kernel_logic: Software architecture is not a static destination but a process of continuous evolution. Code quality is measured by human comprehension rather than machine execution speed. Technical debt is a liability that must be actively managed through constant refactoring to prevent operational bankruptcy.

decision_gates.if: Logic is functional but not self-explanatory
decision_gates.then: Initiate refactoring before any new addition.

decision_gates.if: Adding a new feature causes friction

semantic_anchor: Source code is a medium for human communication that happens to be executable by machines.
